creator: gerrit.kuehn@aei.mpg.de
text:
With recent ports (as of 21st Jun 2013) print/texlive-infra does not fetch correctly:

root@cascade:/usr/ports/print/texlive-infra # make
=> texlive.infra.tar.xz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/TeX.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://tug.org/tex-archive/systems/texlive/tlnet/archive/texlive.infra.tar.xz
fetch: ftp://tug.org/tex-archive/systems/texlive/tlnet/archive/texlive.infra.tar.xz: size mismatch: expected 202680, actual 208688
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/TeX/texlive.infra.tar.xz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/TeX/texlive.infra.tar.xz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/TeX and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/texlive-infra.

Fix: 

Please correct size/checksum information
How-To-Repeat: root@cascade:/usr/ports/print/texlive-infra # make
